title: SUPPORT.md
description: Schema representing the structure and content of a SUPPORT.md community health file for a GitHub repository.

project.description: The name of the open source project this SUPPORT.md applies to.

description.description: A brief description of the project and what kind of support is available.

url.description: URL of the primary documentation site.

gettingStarted.description: URL of the getting started guide.

faq.description: URL of the Frequently Asked Questions page.

channels.description: List of support channels available for the project.

security.description: Information about how to report security vulnerabilities.

email.description: Email address for responsible security disclosure.

policy.description: URL to the security policy (SECURITY.md or similar).

governance.description: Links to governance and community documents.

url.description: URL to access this support channel.

description.description: What kinds of questions or issues belong in this channel.

tags.description: Optional tags for categorizing this support channel.
